title: carex deflexa var. deflexa
intro: Carex deflexa var. deflexa, also known as bent sedge or flexible sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Carex deflexa var. deflexa include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Carex deflexa var. deflexa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions.
